DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_CREATIVE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_CREATIVE]
(

	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CreativeName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,

	[ObjectStorySpecVideoDataCallToActionValueLinkCaption] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ObjectStorySpecVideoDataImageUrl] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ObjectStorySpecVideoDataImageHash] [nvarchar](32)  NULL,
	[PostAttachmentsData] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,

	[VideoContentCategory] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[VideoDescription] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,

	[AssetFeedSpecImages] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,

	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
